Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft Rob Cassil To Appear For Deposition And Produce And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Edythe Marphy's Motion To Compel Defendant Rob Cassil To Appear For Deposition And Produce Documents is granted. Defendant Rob Cassil is ordered to appear for his deposition on a date to be agreed upon by counsel and to be completed no later than April 6, 2007. Objections to documents are not grounds for not appearing. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
